title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates!
